# sdrf-annotated-datasets (LLM / tool context)

> Canonical repository of SDRF (Sample and Data Relationship Format) annotations
> for public proteomics datasets (ProteomeXchange and related accessions). The
> format specification and templates live elsewhere; this repo holds curated
> `.sdrf.tsv` files for community-driven re-annotation and reuse.

## SDRF ecosystem (links)

- **This repository (annotated public datasets):** https://github.com/bigbio/sdrf-annotated-datasets
- **SDRF-Proteomics specification (source, AsciiDoc):** https://github.com/bigbio/proteomics-sample-metadata  
  - Main specification: https://github.com/bigbio/proteomics-sample-metadata/blob/master/sdrf-proteomics/README.adoc  
  - Public site (overview, tools, explorer): https://sdrf.quantms.org/
- **Templates (how to choose layers and columns):** https://github.com/bigbio/proteomics-sample-metadata/blob/master/sdrf-proteomics/TEMPLATES.adoc  
  - Machine-readable template YAML (**sdrf-templates**): https://github.com/bigbio/sdrf-templates
- **Validator / CLI (`parse_sdrf`, used in CI and locally):** https://github.com/bigbio/sdrf-pipelines
- **Agentic annotator toolkit (skills, rules, workflows):** https://github.com/bigbio/sdrf-skills

## Purpose

- Advance **community annotations** with participation from annotators, the **SDRF
  core team**, and **ProteomeXchange** stakeholders.
- Enable **re-annotation** of public proteomics data with consistent,
  machine-validated metadata.
- Keep high-churn annotation work **separate** from the specification repository
  (see ecosystem links above).

## Key paths in this repository

- README.md — Mission, layout, validation, agentic best practices
- CONTRIBUTING.md — PR workflow, local validation, expectations for agent-assisted work
- LICENSE — Apache License 2.0
- datasets/{ACCESSION}/*.sdrf.tsv — Dataset annotations (one folder per accession)
- .github/workflows/validate-sdrf.yml — CI: `parse_sdrf validate-sdrf` on changed files

## When proposing edits

1. Prefer following **[sdrf-skills](https://github.com/bigbio/sdrf-skills)** for
   agentic annotation and validation workflows before editing this repo.
2. Read CONTRIBUTING.md and README.md (agentic section).
3. Only add or change files under `datasets/` unless explicitly asked to update docs or CI.
4. Validate with `parse_sdrf validate-sdrf --sdrf_file <path> --use_ols_cache_only`.
5. In pull request descriptions, link to the public dataset record and state whether output was human-reviewed.

## Migration note

Discussion that motivated splitting annotated projects from the spec repo:
https://github.com/bigbio/proteomics-sample-metadata/issues/817
